name: 懸念＋衝突開場
description: 開場即揭示女主被迫嫁給陌生人的困境，同時拋出雙胞胎替嫁、CEO失明兩大懸念，觀眾立刻想知道：為什麼要替嫁？失明是真是假？他們會怎樣相處？

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: I can't believe I'm marrying a stranger today. / Why me? It's Cora they want. Why? Because you, my dear sister, have lived comfortably all your life while I suffered in poverty with our mother. Plus, you're the only one that can do this for me. Because we have the same face.
